description_long: This hardware store structure consists of a simple, open-sided frame with a corrugated metal roof supported by wooden posts and beams. The roof is made of dark, wavy metal sheeting, providing shelter over a rectangular area. On one side, there are stacked concrete blocks forming a partial wall or display area, while the opposite side features a wooden slat panel, possibly for hanging or displaying items. The materials are utilitarian, with visible wood grain and rough concrete textures, emphasizing function over decorative elements. The overall design is minimal, with no visible doors, windows, or signage, and the layout suggests an outdoor or semi-outdoor retail space for building materials. The structure is compact and modular, suitable for placement in urban environments such as street corners or construction supply lots.
description: A compact, open-sided hardware store shelter with a corrugated metal roof, wooden supports, and stacked concrete blocks. The design is utilitarian and minimal, emphasizing function and material display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the corrugated metal roof, wooden slat panel, single post, and stacked concrete blocks clearly separated.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the roof, the vertical wooden post, and the stacked concrete blocks forming a partial wall.
description_view_2: Rear view with the corrugated roof in the center, concrete blocks on the left, and wooden slat panel and post on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the alignment of the roof, the wooden post, and the stacked blocks from a different angle.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront consists of an open frame with a corrugated metal roof, a wooden slat panel on one side, and stacked concrete blocks on the other, with no visible doors or windows.
